docs.title: Server-Side Hooks
docs.text:
Server-side hook system for the Lilia framework.

Overview

Server-side hooks in the Lilia framework handle server-side logic, data persistence, permissions, character management, and other server-specific functionality. They follow the Garry's Mod hook system and can be overridden or extended by addons and modules.

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Records a warning entry for a character and lets modules react to the new warning.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Fired whenever a warning is issued via admin commands, anti-cheat triggers, or net requests.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description charID **number string** warned string Display name of the warned player. warnedSteamID string SteamID of the warned player. timestamp number Unix timestamp when the warning was created. message string Reason text for the warning. warner string Name of the admin or system issuing the warning. warnerSteamID string SteamID of the issuer. severity string Severity label such as Low/Medium/High.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • string Final severity value chosen (if modified) or nil.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("AddWarning", "LogWarning", function(charID, warned, warnedSteamID, timestamp, message, warner, warnerSteamID, severity)
        lia.log.add(warner, "warningIssued", warned, severity, message)
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Collect additional field definitions for door data.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When retrieving default door values and field definitions.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description extras table Table to populate with additional field definitions in the format {fieldName = {default = value, ...}}.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Modify the extras table directly.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CollectDoorDataFields", "ExampleCollectDoorDataFields", function(extras)
        extras.customField = {default = false, type = "boolean"}
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Determines if an item move is allowed before completing a transfer between inventories.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Checked whenever an item is about to be moved to another inventory (including vendors).

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description item Item Item instance being transferred. inventory Inventory Destination inventory. VendorInventoryMeasure boolean True when the transfer originates from a vendor panel. client Player Player requesting the transfer.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean False to block the transfer; nil/true to allow.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanItemBeTransfered", "LimitAmmoMoves", function(item, inventory, isVendor, client)
        if isVendor and item.isWeapon then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Decides if an entity should be recorded in the persistence system.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Invoked while scanning entities for persistence during map saves.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description entity Entity The world entity being evaluated.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean False to skip saving this entity; nil/true to include it.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPersistEntity", "IgnoreRagdolls", function(ent)
        if ent:IsRagdoll() then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Lets modules override door access checks before built-in permissions are evaluated.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Queried whenever door access is validated in entity:checkDoorAccess.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player requesting access. door Entity Door entity being checked. access number Required access level (e.g., DOOR_OWNER, DOOR_TENANT, DOOR_GUEST).

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean True to grant access regardless of stored permissions; nil to fall back to defaults.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerAccessDoor", "StaffOverrideDoor", function(client, door)
        if client:isStaffOnDuty() then return true end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Allows or denies a player opening/using a vendor entity.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Checked when a player attempts to access a vendor UI.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player interacting with the vendor. vendor Entity Vendor entity being accessed.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean False to block interaction; true/nil to allow.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerAccessVendor", "FactionLockVendors", function(client, vendor)
        if not vendor:isFactionAllowed(client:Team()) then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Controls whether a player may drop a specific item from their inventory.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Triggered before an item drop is performed.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player attempting to drop the item. item Item Item instance being dropped.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean False to block the drop; true/nil to permit.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerDropItem", "NoQuestItemDrops", function(client, item)
        if item.isQuestItem then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Checks whether a player is eligible to receive their periodic salary.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Evaluated each time salary is about to be granted.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player due to receive salary.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean False to block salary payment; true/nil to allow.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerEarnSalary", "JailedNoSalary", function(client)
        if client:isJailed() then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Decides if a player is allowed to equip a given item.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Checked before the equip logic for any item runs.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player equipping the item. item Item Item instance being equipped.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean False to prevent equipping; true/nil to allow.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerEquipItem", "RestrictHeavyArmor", function(client, item)
        if item.weight and item.weight > 20 then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Allows or blocks a player from picking up physics objects with their hands tool.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Checked before a player grabs an entity with lia_hands.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player attempting to hold the object. entity Entity Target entity being picked up.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean False to prevent picking up; true/nil to allow.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerHoldObject", "NoHoldingDoors", function(client, ent)
        if ent:isDoor() then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Lets modules validate or modify player item interactions (use, drop, split, etc.).

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Fired before an inventory action runs on an item.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player performing the action. action string Interaction verb such as "drop", "combine", or a custom action ID. item Item Item instance being interacted with. data table Extra data supplied by the action (position, merge target, etc.).

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean, string False or false,reason to block; true/nil to allow.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerInteractItem", "StopHotbarDrop", function(client, action, item)
        if action == "drop" and item.noDrop then return false, L("cannotDrop") end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Decides if a player may lock a door or vehicle using provided access rights.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Evaluated before lock attempts are processed.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player performing the lock. door Entity Door or vehicle entity targeted.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean False to prevent locking; true/nil to allow.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerLock", "OnlyOwnersLock", function(client, door)
        if not door:checkDoorAccess(client, DOOR_OWNER) then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Controls visibility of specific log categories to a player.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Checked before sending a log entry or opening the log viewer.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player requesting or receiving logs. category string Category identifier of the log.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean False to hide the category; true/nil to show.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerSeeLogCategory", "HideAdminLogs", function(client, category)
        if category == "admin" and not client:isStaffOnDuty() then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Determines whether a player is permitted to spawn a storage entity.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Invoked when a storage deploy action is requested.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player spawning the storage. entity Entity Storage entity class about to be created. info table Context info such as item data or position.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean False to block spawning; true/nil to allow.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerSpawnStorage", "LimitStoragePerPlayer", function(client, entity)
        if client:GetCount("lia_storage") >= 2 then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Validates whether a player may switch from their current character to another.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Checked when a player initiates a character switch.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player requesting the swap. currentCharacter Character Active character. newCharacter Character Target character to switch to.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean False to deny the swap; true/nil to allow.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerSwitchChar", "BlockDuringCombat", function(client)
        if client:isInCombat() then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Checks if a player may take an item out of a container or ground entity.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Fired before item pickup/move from a world/container inventory.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player attempting to take the item. item Item Item instance being taken.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean False to block taking; true/nil to allow.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerTakeItem", "LockdownLooting", function(client, item)
        if lia.state.isLockdown() then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Approves or denies a vendor transaction before money/items exchange.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Invoked when a player tries to buy from or sell to a vendor.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player trading with the vendor. vendor Entity Vendor entity. itemType string UniqueID of the item being traded. isSellingToVendor boolean True when the player sells an item to the vendor.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean, string, any False,reason to cancel; true/nil to allow. Optional third param for formatted message data.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerTradeWithVendor", "RestrictRareItems", function(client, vendor, itemType)
        if lia.item.list[itemType].rarity == "legendary" and not client:isVIP() then
            return false, L("vendorVIPOnly")
        end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Decides if a player may unequip an item currently worn/active.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Checked before unequip logic runs.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player requesting to unequip. item Item Item being unequipped.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean False to block; true/nil to allow.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerUnequipItem", "PreventCombatUnequip", function(client, item)
        if client:isInCombat() then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Decides if a player can unlock a door or vehicle.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Evaluated before unlock attempts are processed.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player performing the unlock. door Entity Door or vehicle entity targeted.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean False to block unlocking; true/nil to allow.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerUnlock", "OnlyOwnersUnlock", function(client, door)
        if not door:checkDoorAccess(client, DOOR_OWNER) then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Validates that a player can use/load a given character record.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Checked before spawning the character into the world.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player requesting to use the character. character Character Character record being selected.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean False to prevent selection; true/nil to allow.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerUseChar", "BanSpecificChar", function(client, character)
        if character:getData("locked") then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Final gate before a player uses a door (open, interact).

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Fired when a player attempts to use a door entity.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player using the door. door Entity Door entity being used.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean False to deny use; true/nil to allow.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerUseDoor", "LockdownUse", function(client, door)
        if lia.state.isLockdown() then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Decides if an entity's data should be included when saving persistent map state.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: During persistence save routines.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description ent Entity Entity being evaluated for save. inventory Inventory Inventory attached to the entity (if any).

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean False to skip saving; true/nil to save.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanSaveData", "SkipTempProps", function(ent)
        if ent.tempSpawned then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Called when salary timers need to be created or recreated.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: During server initialization and when salary timers need to be reset.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil The hook doesn't expect a return value but allows for custom salary timer setup.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CreateSalaryTimers", "ExampleCreateSalaryTimers", function(...)
        -- add custom server-side behavior
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Provides a cleanup hook when a character is fully removed from the server.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After character deletion/cleanup logic runs.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description character Character Character object being cleaned up.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use side effects only.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CharCleanUp", "RemoveCharTimers", function(character)
        timer.Remove("char_timer_" .. character:getID())
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Notifies that a character has been removed from the database and game.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After a character is deleted by the player or admin.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player who owned the character (may be nil if offline). character Character The character that was deleted.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use for cleanup and logging.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CharDeleted", "LogDeletion", function(client, character)
        lia.log.add(client, "charDeleted", character:getName())
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Adds extra per-character info to the character selection list entry.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: While building the char list shown to the client.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player viewing the list. entry table Table of character info to be sent. stored table Raw character data from storage.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • table Optionally return modified entry data.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CharListExtraDetails", "AddPlaytime", function(client, entry, stored)
        entry.playtime = stored.playtime or 0
        return entry
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Runs after a character has been saved to persistence.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Immediately after character data write completes.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description character Character Character that was saved.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use for follow-up actions or logging.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CharPostSave", "QueueBackup", function(character)
        lia.backup.queue(character:getID())
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Pre-save hook for characters to sync state into the database payload.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Right before character data is persisted.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description character Character Character about to be saved.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use to modify character data or run side effects.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CharPreSave", "StoreTempAmmo", function(character)
        local client = character:getPlayer()
        if IsValid(client) then character:setData("ammo", client:GetAmmo()) end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Allows factions to enforce population limits before creation/join.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Checked when a player attempts to create or switch to a faction.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description faction table Faction definition table. character Character Character requesting the faction. client Player Player owning the character.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean False to block joining; true/nil to allow.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CheckFactionLimitReached", "CapCombine", function(faction)
        if faction.uniqueID == "combine" and faction:onlineCount() >= 10 then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Signals that the database connection is established and ready.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Once the SQL connection succeeds during initialization.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Perform setup tasks here.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("DatabaseConnected", "InitPlugins", function()
        lia.plugin.loadAll()
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Allows modules to intercept and modify Discord relay embeds before sending.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Right before an embed is pushed to the Discord relay webhook.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description embed table Table describing the Discord embed payload.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • table Optionally return a modified embed.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("DiscordRelaySend", "AddFooter", function(embed)
        embed.footer = {text = "Lilia Relay"}
        return embed
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Notifies the game that the Discord relay feature became unavailable.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Triggered when the relay HTTP endpoint cannot be reached or is disabled.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use for fallbacks or alerts.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("DiscordRelayUnavailable", "AlertStaff", function()
        lia.log.add(nil, "discordRelayDown")
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Fired after a Discord relay message has been successfully sent.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Immediately after the relay HTTP request completes.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description embed table Embed table that was sent.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use to log or chain notifications.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("DiscordRelayed", "TrackRelayCount", function(embed)
        lia.metrics.bump("discordRelay")
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Signals that a door's enabled/disabled state has been toggled.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After admin tools enable or disable door ownership/usage.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player who toggled the state. door Entity Door entity affected. newState boolean True when enabled, false when disabled.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use for syncing or logging.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("DoorEnabledToggled", "AnnounceToggle", function(client, door, state)
        lia.log.add(client, "doorEnabledToggle", tostring(state))
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Signals that a door has been hidden or unhidden from ownership.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After the hidden flag is toggled for a door entity.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player performing the change. entity Entity Door entity affected. newState boolean True when hidden, false when shown.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use for syncing or side effects.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("DoorHiddenToggled", "MirrorToClients", function(_, door, state)
        net.Start("liaDoorHidden") net.WriteEntity(door) net.WriteBool(state) net.Broadcast()
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Fired when a door lock state is toggled (locked/unlocked).

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After lock/unlock succeeds via key or command.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player who toggled the lock. door Entity Door entity. state boolean True if now locked.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use for logging or notifications.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("DoorLockToggled", "SoundDoorLock", function(_, door, state)
        door:EmitSound(state and "doors/door_latch3.wav" or "doors/door_latch1.wav")
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Signals that a door has been marked ownable or unownable.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After toggling door ownership availability.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player performing the toggle. door Entity Door entity affected. newState boolean True when ownable.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("DoorOwnableToggled", "SyncOwnableState", function(_, door, state)
        net.Start("liaDoorOwnable") net.WriteEntity(door) net.WriteBool(state) net.Broadcast()
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Fired when a door purchase price is changed.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After a player sets a new door price via management tools.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player setting the price. door Entity Door entity. price number New purchase price.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("DoorPriceSet", "LogDoorPrice", function(client, door, price)
        lia.log.add(client, "doorPriceSet", price)
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Fired when a door's title/name is changed.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After a player renames a door via the interface or command.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player setting the title. door Entity Door entity. name string New door title.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("DoorTitleSet", "SaveDoorTitle", function(client, door, name)

    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Requests the server spawn list; gives modules a chance to override or inject spawns.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When spawn points are being loaded or refreshed.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • table Custom spawn data table or nil to use defaults.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("FetchSpawns", "UseCustomSpawns", function()
        return lia.spawns.getCustom()
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Returns a list of all active support tickets claimed by staff.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When the ticket system needs to display open claims.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • table Array of ticket claim data.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetAllCaseClaims", "MirrorTickets", function()
        return lia.ticket.getClaims()
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Provides the model to use for spawning a bot player given a faction.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: During bot setup when choosing a model.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Bot player entity. faction table Faction data assigned to the bot.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • string Model path to use for the bot.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetBotModel", "RandomCitizenModel", function(client, faction)
        if faction.uniqueID == "citizen" then return "models/Humans/Group01/male_07.mdl" end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Lets modules adjust the final damage scale applied to a hitgroup.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: During ScalePlayerDamage after base scaling has been calculated.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description hitgroup number Hitgroup constant from the damage trace. dmgInfo CTakeDamageInfo Damage info object. damageScale number Current scale value about to be applied.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • number New scale value to apply or nil to keep current.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetDamageScale", "HelmetProtection", function(hitgroup, dmgInfo, scale)
        if hitgroup == HITGROUP_HEAD and dmgInfo:IsBulletDamage() then return scale * 0.5 end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Specifies which inventory type to create for a character by default.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: During character creation and bot setup before inventories are instanced.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description character Character Character being initialized (may be nil for bots).

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • string Inventory type ID (e.g., "GridInv").

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetDefaultInventoryType", "UseListInventory", function(character)
        return "ListInv"
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Provides custom data to persist for an entity.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: While serializing entities for persistence saves.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description ent Entity Entity being saved.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • table Data table to store or nil for none.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetEntitySaveData", "SaveHealth", function(ent)
        return {health = ent:Health()}
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Allows modules to set or modify the OOC chat cooldown for a speaker.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Each time an OOC message is about to be sent.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description speaker Player Player sending the OOC message.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • number Cooldown in seconds, or nil to use config default.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetOOCDelay", "VIPShorterCooldown", function(speaker)
        if speaker:isVIP() then return 5 end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Override or calculate a player's tracked playtime value.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When playtime is requested for display or logic.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player whose playtime is queried.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • number Seconds of playtime.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetPlayTime", "CustomPlaytime", function(client)
        return client:getChar():getData("customPlaytime", 0)
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Supplies the death sound file to play for a player.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: During PlayerDeath when death sounds are enabled.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player who died. isFemale boolean Gender flag.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • string Sound path to emit.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetPlayerDeathSound", "FactionDeathSounds", function(client)
        if client:Team() == FACTION_CP then return "npc/metropolice/pain1.wav" end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Provides the pain sound to play for a hurt entity.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: During damage processing when selecting pain sounds.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description paintype string Pain type identifier ("hurt", etc.). isFemale boolean Gender flag. client Entity Entity that is hurt.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • string Sound path to emit, or nil to use default.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetPlayerPainSound", "RobotPain", function(client, paintype)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Allows modules to modify chat behavior after PlayerSay builds recipients.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After chat data is prepared but before sending to clients.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Speaker. message string Message text. chatType string Chat class. anonymous boolean Whether the message is anonymous.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • string, boolean Optionally return modified text and anonymity.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("PostPlayerSay", "AddOOCPrefix", function(client, message, chatType, anonymous)
        if chatType == "ooc" then return "[OOC] " .. message, anonymous end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Fired after damage scaling is applied to a hitgroup.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: At the end of ScalePlayerDamage.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description hitgroup number Hitgroup hit. dmgInfo CTakeDamageInfo Damage info object. damageScale number Scale that was applied.

docs.text: • nil

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("PostScaleDamage", "TrackDamage", function(hitgroup, dmgInfo, scale)
        lia.metrics.bump("damage", dmgInfo:GetDamage() * scale)
    end)

docs.text: Server

docs.title: 📋 Purpose

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage

docs.text: Server

docs.text: Server

docs.text: Server

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

    end)
