docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After a vendor transaction completes.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player trading. vendor Entity Vendor entity. itemType string Item uniqueID. isSellingToVendor boolean True if player sold to vendor.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("VendorTradeEvent", "TrackTrade", function(client, vendor, itemType, selling)
        lia.log.add(client, selling and "vendorSell" or "vendorBuy", itemType)
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Fired when a warning is issued to a player.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Immediately after creating a warning record.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Admin issuing the warning. target Player Player receiving the warning. reason string Warning reason. severity string Severity level. count number Total warnings after issuance. warnerSteamID string Issuer SteamID. targetSteamID string Target SteamID.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("WarningIssued", "RelayToDiscord", function(client, target, reason, severity)
        lia.discord.send("warnings", client:Name(), reason .. " (" .. severity .. ")")
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Fired when a warning is removed from a player.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After the warning record is deleted.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Admin removing the warning. targetClient Player Player whose warning was removed. arg3 table Warning data table. arg4 any Additional context. arg5 any Additional context. arg6 any Additional context.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Server

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("WarningRemoved", "NotifyRemoval", function(client, targetClient, data)
        targetClient:notifyLocalized("warningRemovedNotify", client:Name())
    end)

docs.title: Shared Hooks
docs.text:
Shared hook system for the Lilia framework.

Overview

Shared hooks in the Lilia framework handle functionality available on both client and server, typically for data synchronization, shared utilities, and cross-realm features. They follow the Garry's Mod hook system and can be overridden or extended by addons and modules.

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Let schemas modify validated character creation data before it is saved.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After creation data is sanitized and validated in liaCharCreate, before the final table is merged and written.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player creating the character. data table Sanitized values for registered character variables. newData table Table you can populate with overrides that will be merged into data. originalData table Copy of the raw client payload prior to sanitation.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Mutate data or newData; return value is ignored.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("AdjustCreationData", "ForcePrefix", function(client, data, newData)
        if data.faction == FACTION_STAFF then newData.name = "[STAFF] " .. (newData.name or data.name) end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Allow items or modules to tweak PAC3 part data before it is attached.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Client-side when PAC3 builds part data for an outfit id before AttachPart runs.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description wearer Player Entity that will wear the PAC part. id string Unique part identifier, usually an item uniqueID. data table PAC3 data table that can be edited.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • table|nil Return a replacement data table, or nil to keep the modified data.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("AdjustPACPartData", "TintPoliceVisors", function(wearer, id, data)
        if wearer:Team() == FACTION_POLICE and data.Material then data.Material = "models/shiny" end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Change the stamina delta applied on a tick.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Each stamina update before the offset is clamped and written to the player.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player whose stamina is being processed. offset number Positive regen or negative drain calculated from movement.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • number|nil Override for the stamina offset; nil keeps the existing value.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("AdjustStaminaOffset", "HeavyArmorTax", function(client, offset)
        if client:GetNWBool("HeavyArmor") then return offset - 1 end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: React when an Advanced Dupe 2 paste finishes under BetterDupe.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After AdvDupe2 completes the paste queue so compatibility state can be reset.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description tbl table Paste context provided by AdvDupe2 (first entry is the player).

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Perform cleanup; return value is ignored.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("AdvDupe_FinishPasting", "ClearTempState", function(info)
        local ply = info[1] and info[1].Player
        if IsValid(ply) then ply.tempBetterDupe = nil end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Notify when a PAC3 part is attached to a player.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Client-side after PAC3 part data is retrieved and before it is tracked locally.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player receiving the PAC part. id string Identifier of the part or outfit.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use for side effects such as bookkeeping.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("AttachPart", "TrackPACAttachment", function(client, id)
        lia.log.add(client, "pacAttach", id)
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Respond when a bag item finishes creating or loading its child inventory.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After a bag instance allocates an inventory (on instancing or restore) and access rules are applied.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description bagItem Item The bag item that owns the inventory. inventory Inventory Child inventory created for the bag.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use for setup such as adding access rules or syncing UI.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("BagInventoryReady", "AutoLabelBag", function(bagItem, inventory)
        inventory:setData("bagName", bagItem:getName())
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: React when a bag's inventory is being removed.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Before a bag item deletes its child inventory (e.g., on item removal).

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description bagItem Item Bag being removed. inventory Inventory Child inventory scheduled for deletion.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Perform cleanup such as unloading items.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("BagInventoryRemoved", "DropBagContents", function(bagItem, inv)
        for _, item in pairs(inv:getItems()) do item:transfer(nil, nil, nil, nil, true) end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Calculate the stamina change for a player on a tick.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: From the stamina timer in the attributes module every 0.25s and on client prediction.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player being processed.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • number Positive regen or negative drain applied to the player's stamina pool.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
function MODULE:CalcStaminaChange(client)
        local offset = self.BaseClass.CalcStaminaChange(self, client)
        if client:IsAdmin() then offset = offset + 1 end
        return offset
    end

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Calculate the stamina change for a player on a tick.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: From the stamina timer in the attributes module every 0.25s and on client prediction.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player being processed.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • number Positive regen or negative drain applied to the player's stamina pool.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
function MODULE:CalcStaminaChange(client)
        local offset = self.BaseClass.CalcStaminaChange(self, client)
        if client:IsAdmin() then offset = offset + 1 end
        return offset
    end

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Decide whether a character can be transferred to a new faction or class.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Before character transfer commands/classes move a character to another faction/class.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description tChar Character Character being transferred. faction **number string** arg3 **number string**

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean, string|nil Return false and an optional reason to block the transfer.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanCharBeTransfered", "PreventDuplicateFaction", function(char, factionID)
        if lia.faction.indices[factionID] and lia.faction.indices[factionID].oneCharOnly then
            for _, other in pairs(lia.char.getAll()) do
                if other.steamID == char.steamID and other:getFaction() == factionID then
                    return false, L("charAlreadyInFaction")
                end
            end
        end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Control whether a player can invite another player into a class.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Before sending a class invite through the team management menu.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player issuing the invite. target Player Player being invited.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean, string|nil Return false (optionally with reason) to block the invite.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanInviteToClass", "RestrictByRank", function(client, target)
        if not client:IsAdmin() then return false, L("insufficientPermissions") end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Control whether a player can invite another player into their faction.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When a player tries to invite someone to join their faction in the team menu.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player issuing the invite. target Player Player being invited.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean, string|nil Return false to deny the invitation with an optional message.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanInviteToFaction", "BlockFullFaction", function(client, target)
        local faction = lia.faction.indices[client:Team()]
        if faction and faction.memberLimit and faction.memberLimit <= faction:countMembers() then
            return false, L("limitFaction")
        end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Decide whether an outfit item is allowed to change a player's model.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Before an outfit applies its model change during equip or removal.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description item Item Outfit attempting to change the player's model.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean Return false to prevent the outfit from changing the model.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanOutfitChangeModel", "RestrictModelSwap", function(item)
        return not item.player:getNetVar("NoModelChange", false)
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Determine if a player can edit a vendor's configuration.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When opening the vendor editor or applying vendor changes through the UI.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player attempting to edit. vendor Entity Vendor entity being edited.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean, string|nil Return false to block edits with an optional reason.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPerformVendorEdit", "AdminOnlyVendors", function(client, vendor)
        if not client:IsAdmin() then return false, L("insufficientPermissions") end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Allow or prevent a player from picking up a money entity.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When a player uses a lia_money entity to collect currency.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description activator Entity Entity attempting to pick up the money (usually a Player). moneyEntity Entity Money entity being collected.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean, string|nil Return false to block pickup with an optional message.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPickupMoney", "RespectWantedStatus", function(client, money)
        if client:getNetVar("isWanted") then return false, L("cannotPickupWhileWanted") end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Filter which weapons appear as selectable in the weapon selector.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When building the client weapon selection UI before allowing a weapon choice.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description weapon Weapon Weapon entity being considered.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean Return false to hide or block selection of the weapon.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerChooseWeapon", "HideUnsafeWeapons", function(weapon)
        if weapon:GetClass():find("admin") then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Allow schemas to veto or validate a character creation attempt.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: On the server when a player submits the creation form and before processing begins.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player creating the character. data table Raw creation data received from the client.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean, string|nil Return false and an optional message to deny creation.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerCreateChar", "LimitByPlaytime", function(client)
        if not client:playTimeGreaterThan(3600) then return false, L("needMorePlaytime") end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Decide if a player may join a given class.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Before assigning a class in the class library and character selection.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player requesting the class. class number Target class index. info table Class data table for convenience.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean, string|nil Return false to block the class switch with an optional reason.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerJoinClass", "WhitelistCheck", function(client, class, info)
        if info.requiresWhitelist and not client:getChar():getClasswhitelists()[class] then
            return false, L("noWhitelist")
        end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Control whether a player can knock on a door with their hands.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When the hands SWEP secondary attack is used on a door entity.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description arg1 Player Player attempting to knock. arg2 Entity Door entity being knocked on.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean Return false to prevent the knock action.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerKnock", "BlockPoliceDoors", function(client, door)
        if door.isPoliceDoor then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Gate whether a player can change a configuration variable.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Client- and server-side when a config edit is attempted through the admin tools or config UI.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player attempting the change. key string Config key being modified.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean, string|nil Return false to deny the modification with an optional message.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerModifyConfig", "SuperAdminOnly", function(client)
        if not client:IsSuperAdmin() then return false, L("insufficientPermissions") end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Determine if a player may rotate an item in an inventory grid.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When handling the client drag/drop rotate action for an item slot.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player requesting the rotation. item Item Item instance being rotated.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean, string|nil Return false to block rotation with an optional error message.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerRotateItem", "LockQuestItems", function(client, item)
        if item:getData("questLocked") then return false, L("itemLocked") end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Gate whether a player is allowed to throw a punch.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Before the hands SWEP starts a punch, after playtime and stamina checks.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player attempting to punch.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean|string|nil Return false to stop the punch; optionally return a reason string.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerThrowPunch", "DisallowTiedPlayers", function(client)
        if client:getNetVar("tied") then return false, L("cannotWhileTied") end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Decide if a player can execute a specific console/chat command.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Each time a command is run through the command library before execution.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player running the command. command table Command definition table.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean, string|nil Return false to block the command with an optional reason.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanPlayerUseCommand", "RestrictNonStaff", function(client, command)
        if command.adminOnly and not client:IsAdmin() then return false, L("insufficientPermissions") end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Control whether an item action should be available.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: While building item action menus both client-side (UI) and server-side (validation).

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description tempItem Item Item being acted on. key string Action identifier (e.g., "equip", "drop").

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean Return false to hide or block the action.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CanRunItemAction", "NoDropQuestItems", function(item, action)
        if action == "drop" and item:getData("questLocked") then return false end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Force a character to recognize others within a range.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When the recognition module sets recognition for every character around a player.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description ply Player Player whose character will recognize others. range **string number**

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Perform side effects such as marking characters recognized.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CharForceRecognized", "AlwaysRecognizeStaff", function(ply)
        if ply:IsAdmin() then ply:getChar():giveAllRecognition() end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Override how character flag checks are evaluated.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Whenever playerMeta:hasFlags is queried to determine character permissions.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player whose character is being checked. flags string Flag string to test.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean Return true to force pass, false to force fail, or nil to defer to default logic.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CharHasFlags", "HonorVIP", function(client, flags)
        if client:IsUserGroup("vip") and flags:find("V") then return true end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Modify chat metadata before it is dispatched.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After chat parsing but before the chat type and message are sent to recipients.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Speaker. chatType string Parsed chat command (ic, ooc, etc.). message string Original chat text. anonymous boolean Whether the message is anonymous.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • string, string, boolean|nil Optionally return a replacement chatType, message, and anonymous flag.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("ChatParsed", "AddOOCPrefix", function(client, chatType, message, anonymous)
        if chatType == "ooc" then return chatType, "[GLOBAL] " .. message, anonymous end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: React when a new chat/console command is registered.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Immediately after a command is added to the command library.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description command string Command identifier. data table Command definition table.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use for bookkeeping or adding aliases.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("CommandAdded", "LogCommands", function(name, data)
        print("Command registered:", name, "adminOnly:", data.adminOnly)
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Run logic after a configuration value changes.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When a config entry is updated via admin tools or code on the server.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description key string Config key that changed. value any New value. oldValue any Previous value. client **Player nil**

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use for reacting to config updates.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("ConfigChanged", "BroadcastChange", function(key, value, old, client)
        if SERVER then lia.log.add(client, "configChanged", key, tostring(old), tostring(value)) end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Customize how module files are included.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: During module loading in the modularity library for each include path.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description path string Path of the file being included. MODULE table Module table receiving the include.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Perform side effects; return value is ignored.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("DoModuleIncludes", "TrackModuleIncludes", function(path, MODULE)
        MODULE.loadedFiles = MODULE.loadedFiles or {}
        table.insert(MODULE.loadedFiles, path)
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Force a character to recognize everyone within a given chat range.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: By recognition commands to mark nearby characters as recognized.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description ply Player Player whose recognition list is being updated. range **string number** fakeName **string nil**

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Perform side effects such as logging or extra notifications.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("ForceRecognizeRange", "LogForcedRecognition", function(ply, range)
        lia.log.add(ply, "charRecognizeRange", tostring(range))
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Override the maximum level a character can reach for a given attribute.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Whenever attribute caps are checked, such as when spending points or granting boosts.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player whose attribute cap is being queried. id string Attribute identifier.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • number|nil Maximum allowed level (defaults to infinity).

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetAttributeMax", "HardCapEndurance", function(client, id)
        if id == "end" then return 50 end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Define the maximum starting value for an attribute during character creation.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: While allocating starting attribute points to limit each stat.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player creating the character. attribute string Attribute identifier.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • number|nil Maximum value allowed at creation; nil falls back to default limits.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetAttributeStartingMax", "LowStartForStrength", function(client, attribute)
        if attribute == "str" then return 5 end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Specify a character's maximum stamina pool.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Whenever stamina is clamped, restored, or initialized.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description char Character Character whose stamina cap is being read.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • number|nil Max stamina value; defaults to DefaultStamina config when nil.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetCharMaxStamina", "PerkBonus", function(char)
        if char:hasFlags("S") then return lia.config.get("DefaultStamina", 100) + 25 end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Provide a default character description for a faction.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: During creation validation and adjustment for the desc character variable.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player creating the character. arg2 number Faction index being created. data table Creation payload.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • string, boolean|nil Description text and a flag indicating whether to override the player's input.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetDefaultCharDesc", "StaffDesc", function(client, faction)
        if faction == FACTION_STAFF then return L("staffCharacterDiscordSteamID", "n/a", client:SteamID()), true end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Provide a default character name for a faction.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: During creation validation and adjustment for the name character variable.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player creating the character. faction number Target faction index. data table Creation payload.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • string, boolean|nil Name text and a flag indicating whether to override the player's input.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetDefaultCharName", "StaffTemplate", function(client, faction, data)
        if faction == FACTION_STAFF then return "Staff - " .. client:SteamName(), true end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Override the default inventory dimensions a character starts with.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: During inventory setup on character creation and load.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player owning the character. char Character Character whose inventory size is being set.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • number, number|nil Inventory width and height; nil values fall back to config defaults.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetDefaultInventorySize", "LargeBagsForStaff", function(client, char)
        if client:IsAdmin() then return 8, 6 end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Decide what name is shown for a player in chat based on recognition.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Client-side when rendering chat messages to resolve a display name.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Speaker whose name is being displayed. chatType string Chat channel identifier.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • string|nil Name to display; nil lets the default recognition logic run.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetDisplayedName", "ShowAliasInWhisper", function(client, chatType)
        if chatType == "w" then return client:getChar():getData("alias") end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Adjust the delay between punches for the hands SWEP.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Each time the fists are swung to determine the next attack delay.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description arg1 Player Player punching. arg2 number Default delay before the next punch.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • number|nil Replacement delay; nil keeps the default.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetHandsAttackSpeed", "FasterCombatDrugs", function(client, defaultDelay)
        if client:getNetVar("combatStim") then return defaultDelay * 0.75 end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Override the model used when an item spawns as a world entity.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When an item entity is created server-side to set its model.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description itemTable table Item definition table. itemEntity Entity Spawned item entity.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • string|nil Model path to use; nil keeps the item's configured model.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetItemDropModel", "IconicMoneyBag", function(itemTable)
        if itemTable.uniqueID == "moneycase" then return "models/props_c17/briefcase001a.mdl" end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Override the maximum number of characters a player may create.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When rendering the character list and validating new character creation.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player whose limit is being checked.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • number|nil Maximum character slots; nil falls back to MaxCharacters config.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetMaxPlayerChar", "VIPExtraSlot", function(client)
        if client:IsUserGroup("vip") then return (lia.config.get("MaxCharacters") or 5) + 1 end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Set the total attribute points available during character creation.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: On the creation screen when allocating starting attributes.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player creating the character. count number Default maximum points.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • number|nil Maximum points allowed; nil keeps the default.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetMaxStartingAttributePoints", "PerkBonusPoints", function(client, count)
        if client:IsAdmin() then return count + 5 end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Identify the gender classification for a player model.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When entity meta needs to know if a model is treated as female for voice/animations.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description model string Model path being inspected.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • string|nil "female" to treat as female, or nil for default male handling.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetModelGender", "CustomFemaleModels", function(model)
        if model:find("female_custom") then return "female" end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Pick the world model used by a money entity based on its amount.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When a lia_money entity initializes and sets its model.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description arg1 number Amount of currency the entity holds.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • string|nil Model path override; nil falls back to MoneyModel config.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetMoneyModel", "HighValueCash", function(amount)
        if amount >= 1000 then return "models/props_lab/box01a.mdl" end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Supply additional dialog options for an NPC conversation.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When the client requests dialog options for an NPC and builds the menu.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description arg1 Player Player interacting with the NPC. arg2 Entity NPC being talked to. arg3 boolean Whether the NPC supports customization options.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • table|nil Extra dialog options keyed by unique id; nil keeps defaults only.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetNPCDialogOptions", "AddShopGreeting", function(client, npc)
        return {special = {name = "Ask about wares", callback = function() net.Start("npcShop") net.SendToServer() end}}
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Adjust fist damage output for a punch.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Just before a punch trace applies damage in the hands SWEP.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description arg1 Player Punching player. arg2 number Default damage. arg3 table Context table you may mutate (e.g., context.damage).

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • number|nil New damage value; nil uses context.damage or the original.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetPlayerPunchDamage", "StrengthAffectsPunch", function(client, damage, ctx)
        local char = client:getChar()
        if char then ctx.damage = ctx.damage + char:getAttrib("str", 0) * 0.2 end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Set how long a target is ragdolled when nonlethal punches knock them down.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When a punch would kill a player while lethality is disabled.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description arg1 Player Attacker. arg2 Entity Target player being knocked out.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • number|nil Ragdoll duration in seconds; nil uses PunchRagdollTime config.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetPlayerPunchRagdollTime", "ShorterKO", function(client, target)
        if target:IsAdmin() then return 5 end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Override a vendor's buy/sell price for an item.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When a vendor calculates price for buying from or selling to a player.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description vendor Entity Vendor entity. uniqueID string Item unique ID being priced. price number Base price before modifiers. isSellingToVendor boolean True if the player is selling an item to the vendor.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • number|nil Replacement price; nil keeps the existing calculation.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetPriceOverride", "FactionDiscount", function(vendor, uniqueID, price, selling)
        if vendor.factionDiscount and not selling then return math.Round(price * vendor.factionDiscount) end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Set the ragdoll duration when a player is knocked out.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Whenever playerMeta:setRagdolled determines the ragdoll time.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Player Player being ragdolled. time number Proposed ragdoll time.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • number|nil Replacement time; nil keeps the proposed duration.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetRagdollTime", "ShorterStaffRagdoll", function(client, time)
        if client:IsAdmin() then return math.min(time, 5) end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Apply a global sale/markup scale to vendor transactions.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When vendors compute sale or purchase totals.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description vendor Entity Vendor entity performing the sale.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • number|nil Multiplier applied to prices (e.g., 0.9 for 10% off); nil keeps vendor defaults.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetVendorSaleScale", "HappyHour", function(vendor)
        if vendor:GetNWBool("happyHour") then return 0.8 end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Override the display name derived from a weapon when creating an item or showing UI.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When generating item data from a weapon or showing weapon names in selectors.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description weapon Entity Weapon entity whose name is being resolved.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • string|nil Custom weapon name; nil falls back to print name.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("GetWeaponName", "PrettySWEPNames", function(weapon)
        return language.GetPhrase(weapon:GetClass() .. "_friendly") or weapon:GetPrintName()
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Initialize a storage entity's inventory rules or data.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After a storage entity is created or loaded and before player interaction.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description entity Entity Storage entity being prepared.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Perform setup such as assigning inventory IDs or access rules.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("InitializeStorage", "SetTrunkOwner", function(ent)
        if ent:isVehicle() then ent:setNetVar("storageOwner", ent:GetNWString("owner")) end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Signal that configuration definitions have been loaded client-side.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After the administration config UI finishes building available options.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use to populate UI or cache config data.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("InitializedConfig", "BuildConfigUI", function()
        lia.config.buildList()
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Notify that all items have been registered.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After item scripts finish loading during initialization.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use to add global item behaviors or cache lookups.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("InitializedItems", "CacheItemIDs", function()
        lia.itemIDCache = table.GetKeys(lia.item.list)
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Signal that keybind definitions are loaded.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After keybinds are registered during initialization.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Useful for binding post-load UI actions.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("InitializedKeybinds", "RegisterCustomBind", function()
        lia.key.addBind("ToggleHUD", KEY_F6, "Toggle HUD", function(client) hook.Run("ToggleHUD") end)
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Announce that all modules have finished loading.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After module include phase completes, including reloads.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use to initialize systems that depend on all modules being present.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("InitializedModules", "WarmWorkshopCache", function()
        lia.workshop.cache = lia.workshop.gather()
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Notify that all options have been registered and loaded.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After the option library finishes loading saved values on the client.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use to refresh UI or apply option-driven settings.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("InitializedOptions", "ApplyThemeOption", function()
        hook.Run("OnThemeChanged", lia.option.get("Theme", "Teal"), false)
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Fire once the schema finishes loading.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After schema initialization completes; useful for schema-level setup.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use to perform final initialization dependent on the full schema.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("InitializedSchema", "SetupSchemaData", function()
        lia.schema.setupComplete = true
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: React to inventory metadata changes.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When an inventory's data key is updated and replicated to clients.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description instance Inventory Inventory whose data changed. key string Data key. oldValue any Previous value. value any New value.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use for UI updates or logic tied to inventory metadata.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("InventoryDataChanged", "UpdateBagLabel", function(inv, key, old, new)
        if key == "bagName" then inv:getOwner():notify("Bag renamed to " .. tostring(new)) end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Signal that an inventory has finished initializing on the client.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After an inventory is created or received over the network.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description instance Inventory Inventory that is ready.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use to hook UI creation or caching.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("InventoryInitialized", "ShowInventoryUI", function(inv)
        if inv:getOwner() == LocalPlayer() then lia.inventory.show(inv) end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: React when an item is added to an inventory.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After an item successfully enters an inventory, both server- and client-side.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description inventory Inventory Inventory receiving the item. item Item Item instance added.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use for logging, UI refresh, or triggers.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("InventoryItemAdded", "PlayPickupSound", function(inv, item)
        local owner = inv:getOwner()
        if IsValid(owner) then owner:EmitSound("items/ammocrate_open.wav", 60) end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: React when an item leaves an inventory.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After an item is removed from an inventory, optionally preserving the instance.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description inventory Inventory Inventory losing the item. instance Item Item removed. preserveItem boolean True if the item instance is kept alive (e.g., dropped) instead of deleted.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use for cleanup, UI refresh, or logging.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("InventoryItemRemoved", "LogRemoval", function(inv, item, preserve)
        lia.log.add(inv:getOwner(), "itemRemoved", item.uniqueID, preserve and "preserved" or "deleted")
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Decide if a character is recognized under a fake name.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When checking recognition with fake names enabled.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description character Character Character performing the recognition check. id number Target character ID.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean Return true if recognized via fake name, false otherwise.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("IsCharFakeRecognized", "AlwaysRecognizeSelf", function(character, id)
        if character.id == id then return true end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Override whether one character recognizes another.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Whenever recognition checks are performed for chat or display logic.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description a Character Character performing the check. arg2 number Target character ID.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean Return false to force unrecognized, true to force recognized, or nil to use default logic.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("IsCharRecognized", "FactionAutoRecognize", function(character, id)
        local other = lia.char.getCharacter(id, character:getPlayer())
        if other and other:getFaction() == character:getFaction() then return true end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Declare which chat types should hide names when unrecognized.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Client-side when choosing to display [Unknown] instead of a name.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description chatType string Chat channel identifier.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean Return true to treat the chat type as requiring recognition.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("IsRecognizedChatType", "RecognizedEmote", function(chatType)
        if chatType == "me" then return true end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Check if an entity can host a storage trunk.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Before creating or opening storage tied to an entity (e.g., vehicles).

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description ent Entity Entity being evaluated.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • boolean Return false to disallow trunk storage on this entity.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("IsSuitableForTrunk", "AllowSpecificVehicles", function(vehicle)
        if vehicle:isSimfphysCar() then return true end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: React when persistent data on an item changes.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When an item's data key is updated via networking and propagated to clients.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description item Item Item whose data changed. key string Data key. oldValue any Previous value. newValue any Updated value.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use to update UI or dependent state.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("ItemDataChanged", "UpdateDurabilityUI", function(item, key, old, new)
        if key == "durability" then item:refreshPanels() end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Inject or modify the default function set applied to every item.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: During item registration when the base functions table is copied to a new item.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description arg1 table Functions table for the item being registered.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Mutate the functions table directly.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("ItemDefaultFunctions", "AddInspect", function(funcs)
        funcs.Inspect = {
            name = "inspect",
            onRun = function(item) item.player:notify(item:getDesc()) end
        }
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Notify that an item instance has been initialized client-side.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: When item data is received over the network and the item is constructed.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description item Item Newly initialized item instance.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use for client-side setup such as caching icons.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("ItemInitialized", "PrimeItemPanels", function(item)
        if item.panel then item.panel:Refresh() end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: React when an item's quantity changes.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After quantity is updated and replicated to clients.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description item Item Item whose quantity changed. oldValue number Previous quantity. quantity number New quantity.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use for UI refresh or logic tied to stack counts.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("ItemQuantityChanged", "UpdateStackLabel", function(item, old, new)
        if item.panel then item.panel:SetStack(new) end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Signal that the Lilia client has finished loading.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After pre-load hooks complete on the client startup sequence.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use to kick off client-only systems.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("LiliaLoaded", "OpenHUD", function()
        lia.hud.init()
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Respond to networked variable changes on entities, players, or characters.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: Whenever a netVar is updated via setNetVar on players, entities, or characters.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description client Entity Entity whose netVar changed (player or entity). key string NetVar key. oldValue any Previous value. value any New value.

docs.title: ↩️ Returns
docs.text: • nil Use for side effects or client updates.

docs.title: 🌐 Realm
docs.text: Shared

docs.title: 💡 Example Usage
docs.text:
hook.Add("NetVarChanged", "TrackStamina", function(entity, key, old, new)
        if key == "stamina" and entity:IsPlayer() then entity.lastStamina = new end
    end)

docs.title: 📋 Purpose
docs.text: Signal that the admin system integration has loaded.

docs.title: ⏰ When Called
docs.text: After administration modules finish initializing and privileges are available.

docs.title: ⚙️ Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description arg1 **table nil** arg2 **table nil**
